violations.description: Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mops not being hung to drip and dry when not in use.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Coke machine requires more thorough cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fan covers in the walk-in cooler need to be cleaned. - cutting board rack needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - floors require more frequent or thorough cleaning.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. - Flies in the facility are not being controled adequately.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
